enrichment.short_description: Lusha is a B2B sales intelligence platform providing verified contact and company data, buying signals, and prospecting tools for go-to-market teams.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Lusha provides verified B2B contact data, phone numbers, and buying signals for sales prospecting, with a free plan and credit-based paid tiers.

features.title: Contact & company database
features.description: 300M+ contacts and 30M+ company profiles with verified emails and direct phone numbers.

features.title: Data accuracy
features.description: Claims 98% email accuracy, drawing on 1.2B+ data points refreshed daily.

features.title: Buying signals & ICP scoring
features.description: ICP scoring, lookalike identification, and account prioritization for GTM teams.

features.title: Chrome extension
features.description: Reveal contact details directly while browsing LinkedIn and other sites.

features.title: CRM integrations
features.description: Native integrations with Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, and Monday.

features.title: AI assistant & automation connections
features.description: Works with Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity, plus Clay, Make, n8n, and Zapier via MCP.

pros: Free plan available with 40 monthly credits
Chrome extension enables in-browser prospecting
Direct integrations with major CRMs and AI assistants
SOC 2 Type II and ISO 31700 certified
cons: Phone number reveals cost 10 credits versus 1 credit for emails
Scale (top) tier requires contacting sales for custom pricing
Unused monthly credits only roll over up to 2x the plan's limit

faqs.question: Does Lusha have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Lusha offers a free plan with 40 credits per month.

faqs.question: How much does revealing a phone number cost?
faqs.answer: A phone number reveal costs 10 credits, compared to 1 credit for an email.

faqs.question: What CRMs does Lusha integrate with?
faqs.answer: Salesforce, HubSpot, Monday, and Zoho.

faqs.question: Is Lusha compliant with data regulations?
faqs.answer: Lusha states it is GDPR and CCPA compliant, and ISO 31700 and SOC 2 Type II certified.

faqs.question: Can Lusha be used with AI assistants?
faqs.answer: Yes, via MCP with Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity.

use_cases.title: Prospecting and lead generation
use_cases.description: Find verified emails and phone numbers for outbound outreach.

use_cases.title: CRM data enrichment
use_cases.description: Keep CRM contact and company records accurate and current.

use_cases.title: Candidate sourcing
use_cases.description: Find contact details for recruiting outreach.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Lusha?
paragraphs: Lusha is a B2B data and intelligence platform used by go-to-market teams to find verified emails, direct phone numbers, and firmographic and technographic data on prospects and companies.

Beyond raw contact data, Lusha layers in buying signals such as ICP scoring, lookalike account identification, and website visitor intelligence, and it connects directly to CRMs, automation tools, and AI assistants via MCP.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Lusha is for
paragraphs: Lusha is built for sales development reps, business development teams, and GTM organizations that need accurate contact data for prospecting, ABM campaigns, and CRM enrichment, with a free tier for individuals getting started.

enrichment.short_description: Cognism is a B2B sales intelligence platform delivering phone-verified contact data, intent signals, and CRM enrichment for enterprise sales teams.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Cognism offers phone-verified B2B contact data, intent signals, and CRM enrichment for sales teams, with custom quote-based pricing.

features.title: Sales intelligence
features.description: Prospect identification using phone-verified data plus intent, hiring, and funding signals.

features.title: CRM enrichment
features.description: Automatically enriches and maintains CRM records.

features.title: Data-as-a-Service (DaaS)
features.description: Delivers verified B2B data via API or batch export.

features.title: Data fusion engine
features.description: A proprietary process where AI stitches together data points per company before filtering through verification layers.

features.title: Compliance screening
features.description: Built-in DNC and TPS screening for outbound calling.

features.title: CRM integrations
features.description: Connects with Salesforce, HubSpot, and Pipedrive.

pros: Emphasis on phone-verified data, useful for cold-calling teams
Built-in DNC/TPS compliance screening
ISO 27001 and 27701 certified, SOC 2 Type II audited
Supports English, German, and French
cons: No public pricing; every plan requires a sales quote
No free plan or self-serve trial mentioned on the site
Site indicates teams of 5+ salespeople get the most value, suggesting less fit for very small teams

faqs.question: Does Cognism publish its pricing?
faqs.answer: No, pricing is tailored and quote-based depending on the product, team setup, and usage.

faqs.question: How does Cognism verify its data?
faqs.answer: It uses phone-verified data and an AI-driven data fusion engine with verification layers.

faqs.question: What CRMs does Cognism integrate with?
faqs.answer: Salesforce, HubSpot, and Pipedrive.

faqs.question: Is Cognism compliant with data regulations?
faqs.answer: Yes, it states GDPR and CCPA compliance plus ISO 27001/27701 certification.

faqs.question: What languages does Cognism support?
faqs.answer: English, German, and French.

use_cases.title: Enterprise sales prospecting
use_cases.description: Identify prospects using phone-verified contact data and buying signals.

use_cases.title: CRM data enrichment
use_cases.description: Automatically enrich and maintain CRM records.

use_cases.title: Compliant outbound calling
use_cases.description: Screen numbers against DNC/TPS lists before calling.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Cognism?
paragraphs: Cognism is a B2B sales intelligence platform that provides phone-verified contact data, intent and hiring/funding signals, and CRM enrichment for revenue teams, with particular strength in European markets.

It also offers a Data-as-a-Service option, delivering verified B2B data via API or batch export, and runs data through an AI-driven fusion engine plus compliance screening (DNC/TPS) before it reaches sales teams.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Cognism is for
paragraphs: Cognism targets enterprise and mid-market sales, marketing, and revenue operations teams in B2B markets, with the site noting teams of 5 or more salespeople tend to see the most value; all pricing is quote-based.

enrichment.short_description: LeadIQ is a B2B prospecting platform that captures, enriches, and syncs sales leads to CRMs with browser tools and AI-driven account targeting.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: LeadIQ helps sales teams find, enrich, and sync verified contact data to their CRM, with champion tracking, AI account prospecting, and a free plan.

features.title: Prospector
features.description: One-click lead capture with personalized outreach synced to your CRM from the browser.

features.title: Champion tracking
features.description: Real-time alerts when past contacts change jobs, so reps can reconnect.

features.title: AI account prospecting
features.description: Automatically identifies ideal-fit accounts and key decision-makers.

features.title: CRM enrichment
features.description: Native Salesforce managed package and HubSpot integration via Workato.

features.title: Lando Agent
features.description: AI conversational interface combining first- and third-party data.

features.title: MCP integration
features.description: Natural-language prospecting using existing credits.

pros: Free plan with 50 credits to start
Native Salesforce managed package integration
Champion/job-change tracking to re-engage past contacts
SOC 2 Type II compliant and GDPR-ready
cons: Credit-based pricing gets costly at scale (phone lookups cost 10 credits)
AI Account Prospecting and Lando Agent are Enterprise-only
Enterprise plan requires annual billing and custom quoting

faqs.question: Does LeadIQ have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free plan with 1 user and 50 credits.

faqs.question: How much does LeadIQ Pro cost?
faqs.answer: $200/month billed monthly, or $150/month billed annually, for up to 5 users.

faqs.question: How does LeadIQ's credit system work?
faqs.answer: 1 credit for an email, 10 for a phone number, 11 for both, and 3 for account enrichment.

faqs.question: What CRMs does LeadIQ integrate with?
faqs.answer: Salesforce (native), HubSpot (via Workato), Outreach, Salesloft, Gong, and others.

faqs.question: Is Champion Tracking available on the free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Champion Tracking is included across Free, Pro, and Enterprise plans.

use_cases.title: Prospecting new accounts
use_cases.description: Capture and enrich leads directly from the browser and sync to CRM.

use_cases.title: Tracking champions who change jobs
use_cases.description: Get alerted when past contacts move to new companies.

use_cases.title: CRM enrichment at scale
use_cases.description: Keep CRM contact and account records accurate.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is LeadIQ?
paragraphs: LeadIQ is a B2B prospecting platform that lets sales teams capture, enrich, and sync leads to their CRM directly from the browser, with a native Salesforce managed package and HubSpot integration via Workato.

Its Champion Tracking feature alerts reps when past contacts change jobs, while AI Account Prospecting and the Lando Agent (Enterprise-only) use AI to surface ideal-fit accounts and combine first- and third-party data.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who LeadIQ is for
paragraphs: LeadIQ is aimed at sales development reps and revenue teams focused on pipeline generation, with a free tier for individuals and credit-based paid plans for teams that need higher volume.

enrichment.short_description: ZoomInfo is a go-to-market platform providing verified B2B contact and company data, buying-intent signals, and sales/marketing automation tools.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: ZoomInfo is a go-to-market platform offering verified B2B contact data, intent signals, and sales automation, with a free tier and custom enterprise pricing.

features.title: Contact & company database
features.description: Comprehensive B2B profiles with real-time data verification and advanced filtering.

features.title: Buying intent signals
features.description: Identifies accounts showing purchase intent.

features.title: WebSights
features.description: Identifies anonymous website visitors.

features.title: Chorus
features.description: Conversation intelligence add-on that analyzes sales calls.

features.title: Copilot
features.description: AI-powered prospecting assistant add-on.

features.title: Workflows
features.description: Sales and marketing automation builder.

pros: ZoomInfo Lite is a permanent free tier with no credit card required
Large, well-established B2B data set from a public company (Nasdaq: GTM)
Add-on modules (Chorus, Copilot) extend beyond core data into conversation intelligence and AI prospecting
GDPR and CCPA compliant
cons: Paid plan pricing is not published; requires a custom sales quote
Cost varies based on team size, credit volume, and add-ons selected
Free tier (ZoomInfo Lite) is limited to 10 monthly credits (25 with Community Edition)

faqs.question: Is there a free version of ZoomInfo?
faqs.answer: Yes, ZoomInfo Lite is a permanent free tier with 10 monthly credits (25 with Community Edition).

faqs.question: When was ZoomInfo founded?
faqs.answer: 2007, originally as DiscoverOrg; it was rebranded to ZoomInfo after acquiring Zoom Information, Inc. in 2019.

faqs.question: Where is ZoomInfo headquartered?
faqs.answer: Vancouver, Washington, USA.

faqs.question: Is ZoomInfo publicly traded?
faqs.answer: Yes, on the Nasdaq under the ticker GTM.

faqs.question: Does ZoomInfo offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, free trials with unlimited searches and profile views are available.

use_cases.title: Enterprise B2B prospecting
use_cases.description: Identify and reach target accounts and contacts using verified data.

use_cases.title: Intent-based account targeting
use_cases.description: Prioritize accounts showing active buying intent.

use_cases.title: Conversation intelligence
use_cases.description: Analyze sales calls with the Chorus add-on.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is ZoomInfo?
paragraphs: ZoomInfo, founded in 2007 (originally as DiscoverOrg and rebranded after acquiring Zoom Information, Inc. in 2019), is a go-to-market platform headquartered in Vancouver, Washington, and publicly traded on the Nasdaq under the ticker GTM.

The platform provides verified B2B contact and company data, buying-intent signals, and add-on modules such as Chorus for conversation intelligence and Copilot for AI-powered prospecting, integrating with CRM and sales engagement tools.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who ZoomInfo is for
paragraphs: ZoomInfo serves enterprise and mid-market sales, marketing, and revenue operations teams, with a permanent free tier (ZoomInfo Lite) for individuals and custom-quoted paid plans for teams needing higher data volume and add-ons.

enrichment.short_description: Seamless.AI is a real-time search engine that helps B2B sales teams find verified emails, phone numbers, and buying-intent data for prospecting.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Seamless.AI is a real-time B2B contact search engine offering verified emails, phone numbers, and buyer intent data, with a free 50-credit plan.

features.title: Real-time search engine
features.description: 1.8B+ verified emails and 414M+ phone numbers with 100+ live data points per profile.

features.title: Prospector
features.description: Finds and prioritizes leads to help close deals.

features.title: Buyer intent
features.description: Identifies prospects showing signs of purchase readiness.

features.title: Job changes tracking
features.description: Alerts when tracked contacts move to new roles.

features.description: Keeps CRM contact data clean and current.

features.title: Engagement Hub
features.description: Multi-channel outreach across email, calling, and social selling.

features.description: Find leads while browsing the web.

pros: Free plan with 50 credits and no cost to start
Large real-time data engine with 100+ data points per profile
Chrome extension for in-browser prospecting
Engagement Hub bundles multi-channel outreach with data
cons: Pro plan pricing is not published; requires contacting sales for per-user/credit-package pricing
Free plan lacks an admin seat, advanced org management, and add-ons
Dedicated success manager and phone support are reserved for Enterprise

faqs.question: Does Seamless.AI have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, with 50 credits, 1 user, and self-serve support.

faqs.question: How much does the Pro plan cost?
faqs.answer: Per-user pricing with annual credit packages, available by contacting sales.

faqs.question: What data does Seamless.AI provide?
faqs.answer: Verified emails and phone numbers plus real-time buyer intent signals.

faqs.question: Is there a browser extension?
faqs.answer: Yes, a Chrome extension is available for prospecting while browsing.

faqs.question: Does Seamless.AI integrate with other tools?
faqs.answer: Yes, the site states it connects with 6,000+ tools including CRMs.

use_cases.title: Real-time lead prospecting
use_cases.description: Search for verified contact data in real time.

use_cases.title: Buyer intent targeting
use_cases.description: Prioritize outreach to prospects showing purchase intent.

use_cases.title: CRM data cleanup
use_cases.description: Keep existing CRM records accurate via CRM Enrich.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Seamless.AI?
paragraphs: Seamless.AI describes itself as a real-time search engine that helps B2B companies find verified emails and phone numbers, drawing on a database of 1.8B+ emails and 414M+ phone numbers with 100+ live data points per profile.

Beyond data lookup, it includes buyer intent signals, job-change tracking, CRM enrichment, and an Engagement Hub for multi-channel outreach, plus AI agent features for automating outbound and other workflows on paid plans.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Seamless.AI is for
paragraphs: The platform targets SDRs, account executives, sales leaders, RevOps, founders, marketers, recruiters, and customer success teams, offering a free 50-credit plan alongside per-user paid plans for higher-volume use.

enrichment.short_description: Attio is an AI-native CRM that lets revenue teams manage pipeline, automate outreach sequences, and analyze calls, with native AI search and workflows.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Attio is an AI-native CRM with real-time contact syncing, automated enrichment, sequences, and call intelligence, with a free plan for up to 3 seats.

features.description: AI-powered search and record creation built into the CRM.

features.description: Automatically logs emails, calls, and activity from integrated tools.

features.title: Workflows

features.title: Sequences

features.title: Real-time reporting
features.description: Pipeline analytics and revenue forecasting.

pros: Free plan available for up to 3 seats with real-time syncing and enrichment
Native AI search (Ask Attio) built into the CRM
Integrates with Claude, Slack, Notion, Linear, and Stripe via API, SDK, and MCP
iOS and Android mobile apps available
cons: Call Intelligence and Sequences require the Pro plan or above
Enterprise plan pricing is custom and billed annually only
Free plan is capped at 3 seats

faqs.question: Does Attio have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, free for up to 3 seats with real-time contact syncing and automatic enrichment.

faqs.question: How much does Attio Pro cost?
faqs.answer: €86/user/month billed monthly, or €69/user/month billed annually.

faqs.question: Does Attio have mobile apps?
faqs.answer: Yes, iOS and Android apps are available.

faqs.question: What AI features does Attio offer?
faqs.answer: "Ask Attio" for AI-powered search and record creation, plus AI-driven lead research and account monitoring.

faqs.question: What does Attio integrate with?
faqs.answer: Claude, Slack, Notion, Linear, Stripe, Granola, Lemlist, and others via API, SDK, and MCP.

use_cases.title: Pipeline and deal management
use_cases.description: Track deals, advance pipeline, and monitor account health.

use_cases.title: Automated outreach sequences
use_cases.description: Run personalized, multi-step outreach campaigns.

use_cases.title: Call recording and analysis
use_cases.description: Record and analyze sales calls with Call Intelligence.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Attio?
paragraphs: Attio is a CRM built around AI and automation, offering native AI search (Ask Attio), Universal Context activity logging, Workflows for automation, and Sequences for personalized outreach.

Paid tiers add Call Intelligence for recording and analyzing meetings, along with real-time reporting for pipeline and revenue forecasting, and the product integrates with tools like Claude, Slack, Notion, and Stripe via API, SDK, and MCP.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Attio is for
paragraphs: Attio serves sales and revenue operations teams from startups to enterprises, with a free plan for small teams of up to 3 seats and paid tiers that unlock sequences, call intelligence, and enterprise security controls.

enrichment.short_description: Capsule CRM is contact and sales pipeline management software with project tracking, workflow automation, and AI-assisted features for small and mid-sized businesses.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Capsule CRM offers contact management, sales pipelines, and project tracking with AI features, plus a free plan for up to 2 users and 250 contacts.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Capsule CRM?
paragraphs: Capsule CRM combines contact management, sales pipeline tracking, and project management with workflow automation and sales analytics, plus marketing features like social and email campaigns.
Recent AI additions include an AI Pipeline Generator, AI Business and Contact Enrichment, and an AI meeting prep feature currently in beta, alongside 100+ third-party integrations.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Capsule CRM is for
paragraphs: Capsule serves solopreneurs, startups, and small-to-medium businesses across sectors like professional services, consulting, and construction, with a free tier for very small teams and paid tiers for growing sales organizations.

enrichment.short_description: Streak is a Gmail-integrated CRM that lets teams manage sales pipelines, contacts, and follow-ups directly inside their inbox.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Streak is a Gmail-based CRM for tracking pipelines and contacts inside your inbox, with free email tools and paid plans from $49/user/month.

features.title: Gmail-integrated CRM
features.description: Manage pipelines and contacts directly inside the Gmail inbox.

features.title: Pipeline management
features.description: Track deals through custom stages with data validation rules.

features.title: AI data entry
features.description: AI keeps deal records updated automatically and supports natural language queries.

features.title: Email tracking and mail merge
features.description: Read receipts, snippets, and bulk email tools, with a free-forever tier for basic use.

features.title: Contact and company database
features.description: Collaborative contact and company record building.

features.title: Custom reporting
features.description: Customizable funnel reports.

pros: Works natively inside Gmail without switching tools
Free-forever email tools (tracking, snippets, mail merge up to 50/day) without a paid plan
AI credits included on every paid plan for automated data entry
Founded in 2011 with a long track record; site cites 4,000+ companies and 750,000+ professionals
cons: No free tier for full CRM/pipeline functionality, only the email power-tools are free
Enterprise plan requires a minimum of 10 seats and contacting sales
Available only as a browser extension (Chrome, Safari, Edge), not a standalone desktop app

faqs.question: Is Streak free?
faqs.answer: Core email tools (tracking, snippets, mail merge up to 50/day) are free forever, but full CRM plans start at $49/user/month.

faqs.question: Does Streak offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Pro+ plan offers a 14-day free trial.

faqs.question: What browsers does Streak support?
faqs.answer: Chrome, Safari, and Microsoft Edge.

faqs.question: When was Streak founded?
Does Streak have AI features?
faqs.answer: Yes, AI data entry and natural language queries, with AI credits included per plan (20-500 per user/month depending on tier).

use_cases.title: Gmail-based deal tracking
use_cases.description: Manage a sales pipeline without leaving the inbox.

use_cases.title: Real estate and VC deal flow
use_cases.description: Track deals and relationships in Gmail.

use_cases.title: Hiring pipeline management
use_cases.description: Track candidates through a pipeline in Gmail.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Streak?
paragraphs: Streak, founded in 2011, is a CRM built directly into Gmail, letting users track deals, log emails, and manage follow-ups without leaving their inbox, using a Chrome, Safari, or Edge browser extension.

Paid plans add AI-assisted data entry, advanced reporting, and integrations, while a set of email power tools (tracking, snippets, and mail merge up to 50/day) remain free without a paid subscription.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Streak is for
paragraphs: Streak is used by sales teams, real estate professionals, venture capital firms, and small businesses that want CRM functionality inside Gmail rather than a separate application.

enrichment.short_description: folk is a CRM that centralizes contacts, pipelines, and outreach with LinkedIn-based enrichment and AI follow-up and research assistants.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: folk is a CRM with LinkedIn-based contact enrichment and AI follow-up, recap, and research assistants, starting at $30/member/month.

faqs.answer: Follow-up, Recap, Research, and Workflow Assistants.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is folk?
paragraphs: folk is a CRM that captures contacts and context via a browser extension (folkX) connected to LinkedIn and other platforms, with waterfall enrichment to fill in missing contact details.
It includes four AI assistants — Follow-up, Recap, Research, and Workflow — that automate outreach suggestions, meeting summaries, company research, and triggered email sending.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who folk is for
paragraphs: folk targets sales teams, agencies, and partnership teams that rely heavily on LinkedIn-sourced relationships, offering a 14-day trial rather than a permanent free plan.

enrichment.short_description: Twenty is an open-source CRM that lets technical teams build custom objects and no-code workflows, self-hosted for free or in the cloud from $9/user/month.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Twenty is an open-source CRM with custom objects, no-code workflows, and native AI agents, self-hostable free or in the cloud from $9/user/month.

features.title: Custom objects & data modeling
features.description: Build data structures tailored to the business without vendor lock-in.

features.title: No-code workflow automation
features.description: Automate processes without writing code.

features.title: Native MCP server
features.description: Connects Twenty to AI assistants like Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor via OAuth.

features.title: AI chat and agents
features.description: Real-time AI chat assistance and custom AI skills/agents via a developer framework.

features.title: Self-hosted or cloud
features.description: Deploy on your own infrastructure or use Twenty's cloud offering.

features.title: Data import/export
features.description: CSV and API import/export for 50,000+ records.

features.title: Open source
features.description: Full source code available; described on the site as the #1 open-source CRM on GitHub.

pros: Free to self-host as open-source software
Native integration with Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor via OAuth
No vendor lock-in due to fully customizable data model
30-day free trial on cloud plans
cons: Self-hosting requires technical setup and ongoing maintenance
SSO and row-level permissions are gated behind the pricier Organization plan
Workflow credits are limited (50/year included) before extra usage is needed

faqs.question: Is Twenty free?
faqs.answer: Yes, it's open source and free to self-host; cloud plans start at $9/user/month.

faqs.question: Does Twenty offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 30-day free trial is available on cloud plans.

faqs.question: Can Twenty connect to AI assistants?
faqs.answer: Yes, via a native MCP server with Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor.

faqs.question: What's the difference between Pro and Organization plans?
faqs.answer: Organization adds row-level permissions, SAML/OIDC SSO, a custom domain, and a higher API rate limit.

faqs.question: Does Twenty support multiple languages?
faqs.answer: Yes, the pricing page states 30+ language support for the interface.

use_cases.title: Custom CRM for technical teams
use_cases.description: Build a CRM data model tailored to the business.

use_cases.title: Self-hosted CRM to avoid vendor lock-in
use_cases.description: Run Twenty on your own infrastructure.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted CRM workflows
use_cases.description: Use AI chat and agents to assist with CRM data tasks.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Twenty?
paragraphs: Twenty is an open-source CRM that gives technical teams building blocks — custom objects, no-code workflows, and an apps framework — to build a CRM tailored to complex business needs, self-hosted or in the cloud.
It includes a native MCP server for connecting to AI assistants like Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor, plus CSV/API data import and export for large datasets.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Twenty is for
paragraphs: Twenty is aimed at technical teams and organizations that want a customizable, self-hostable CRM without vendor lock-in, with cloud pricing starting at $9/user/month for teams that prefer a managed option.
